description: The Avignone are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Taurianova, Reggio Calabria. They operate in Taurianova and were involved in drug trafficking in Genoa during the 1990s. Allied with the Mamone, Piromalli, Zappia, and Gullace-Raso-Albanese clans. The DIA describes them as one of the most traditional and high-profile criminal organizations in the 'Ndrangheta.

country_links.evidence_quote: Vincenzo Avignone (1963), ha operato a Roma per un periodo ora lavora nel suo ristorante a Schwerin in Germania .
country_links.context: Vincenzo Avignone, a member of the 'Ndrina Avignone, operates a restaurant in Schwerin, Germany, indicating the organization's presence there.
